steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$x^{2}-28x=0$$Graph or solve it directly and read the x-value that works. The requested value is $28$.

steps.title: Apply the zero-product property
steps.content: Setting each factor equal to zero gives $x=0$ or $x-28=0$, so the solutions are $x=0$ and $x=28$.

steps.title: Compare with each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — $56$: $56^{2}-28(56)=3136-1568=1568 eq 0$. Eliminated.
  • Choice B — $28$: $28^{2}-28(28)=784-784=0$. Matches.
  • Choice C — $14$: $14^{2}-28(14)=196-392=-196 eq 0$. Eliminated.
  • Choice D — $\sqrt{28}$: $28-28\sqrt{28} eq 0$. Eliminated.
That is the correct answer.
